title: Pick<T, K> — keeps only the named properties
description: mion utility/pick.spec.ts — selects a subset of properties. Resolves to {name: string; createdAt: Date}.
notes: Resolves to a fixed-property object with only the picked keys. Extra properties on the input still pass (structural typing).
schema: createValidate(RT.pick(RT.object({name: RT.string(), age: RT.number(), createdAt: RT.date()}), ['name', 'createdAt']))
generated: function YOw_CEYCicS(v){return (typeof v === 'object' && v !== null && typeof v.name === 'string' && (v.createdAt instanceof Date && !isNaN(v.createdAt.getTime())))}
